dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Eastern Empire. A land of prosperity, guided by a lineage of powerful emperors and their empresses. Among them, Empress Navier Trovi was considered the pinnacle of perfection.

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: The trade agreement with the Western Kingdom requires careful review of the tariffs on silk imports. Ensure the revised figures are presented to the council by tomorrow morning.

dialogue.speaker: Countess Jubel
dialogue.line: Yes, Your Majesty. It shall be done.

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: And the charity ball preparations? Have the invitations been sent to all the noble houses?

dialogue.speaker: Marquess Ketron
dialogue.line: All dispatched, Your Majesty. We await their RSVPs.

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: (My life has always been a meticulously crafted schedule. Every moment dedicated to the Empire, to my role.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE of silk, GENTLE CLINK of teacups

dialogue.speaker: Maid
dialogue.line: Your Majesty, His Imperial Majesty, Emperor Sovieshu, has returned.

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: Oh? So soon? I was not informed of his early return from the hunting trip.

dialogue.speaker: Countess Jubel
dialogue.line: Perhaps he simply wished to surprise you, Your Majesty.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS approaching, MURMURS from the hallway

dialogue.speaker: Sovieshu
dialogue.line: Navier. I've returned.

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: Welcome back, Your Majesty. I trust your hunting trip was fruitful?

dialogue.speaker: Sovieshu
dialogue.line: Indeed. More fruitful than I could have imagined. I found something quite... precious.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASPS from the ladies-in-waiting

dialogue.speaker: Sovieshu
dialogue.line: This is Rashta. She was captured by slave traders, and I rescued her. From now on, she will reside in the Western Palace as my concubine.

dialogue.speaker: Rashta
dialogue.line: (Trembling slightly) Your... Your Majesty... Empress Navier...

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: (A concubine? Brought directly into the palace, without so much as a prior word. And so openly.)

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: I see. Welcome to the Imperial Palace, Rashta. I trust you will find your stay comfortable.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHISPERS among the court ladies

dialogue.speaker: Lady Eliza
dialogue.line: Did you see her dress? So plain... and her hair, unkempt!

dialogue.speaker: Countess Jubel
dialogue.line: Hush, Eliza. But to bring her directly before the Empress...

dialogue.speaker: Sovieshu
dialogue.line: Navier, Rashta has been through a traumatic experience. I expect her to be treated with the utmost care and respect.

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: Of course, Your Majesty. All imperial residents are treated with respect.

dialogue.speaker: Rashta
dialogue.line: (Tears welling up) Rashta... Rashta is so grateful to His Majesty. He is Rashta's savior.

dialogue.speaker: Sovieshu
dialogue.line: (Gently patting her shoulder) There, there, Rashta. You're safe now.

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: (His touch... he hasn't touched me like that in years. Not since we were children.)

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: If you'll excuse me, Your Majesty. I have further duties to attend to.

dialogue.speaker: Sovieshu
dialogue.line: Very well. I will ensure Rashta settles in.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DOOR CLOSES softly

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: (A concubine. It was bound to happen eventually. But to be so... blatant. It's not the concubine herself that bothers me, but the disregard for protocol, for me. Our marriage was a political alliance, a duty. But even duties require a certain level of decorum.)

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: (I am the Empress. My emotions are a luxury I cannot afford. I will simply observe.)

dialogue.speaker: Countess Jubel
dialogue.line: Your Majesty, are you quite alright?

dialogue.speaker: Navier
dialogue.line: Perfectly, Countess. Let us resume our work. The Empire does not stop for trivial matters.

summary: Empress Navier, known for her perfection and unwavering dedication to the Eastern Empire, is surprised by Emperor Sovieshu's early return from a hunting trip. He introduces a young, seemingly innocent woman named Rashta, declaring her his new concubine and bringing her directly into the palace, setting the stage for a dramatic shift in the imperial court.
